    (Λ'.move natEnd k rev
      (Λ'.push rev (fun x => some Γ'.cons)

S : Finset Λ'
k : K'
q : Λ'
H : Λ'.Supports S q
⊢ match head k q with
  | Λ'.move p k₁ k₂ q => Λ'.Supports S q
  | Λ'.push k s q => Λ'.Supports S q
  | Λ'.read q => ∀ (s : Option Γ'), Λ'.Supports S (q s)
  | Λ'.clear p k q => Λ'.Supports S q
  | q.copy => Λ'.Supports S q
  | q.succ => Λ'.Supports S q
  | q₁.pred q₂ => Λ'.Supports S q₁ ∧ Λ'.Supports S q₂
  | Λ'.ret k => contSupp k ⊆ S
